name: Rebirth Ritual
timing: Play immediately after a character you control is slain.
description: The slain character loses possession of any Moonstones it was carrying as normal. Then place it in base contact with a target friendly character in play. Choose any value for X that is 1 or greater. The target suffers X Wds. The slain character restores X Wds; it has no energy but may activate this turn.
extraDescription: The returned character is no longer slain and is able to activate in each following turn as normal.
